name: surface
description: Ephemeral, distributable UI surfaces an agent stands up itself: opaque-ID affordances, autonomous draining, reactions in code.

plugins.name: surface
plugins.description: Ad-hoc structured input from one or more recipients via a flexible, distributable interface. The agent generates a task-shaped page of opaque-ID affordances, ships the URL through whatever channel reaches the recipients, and autonomously drains submissions to react. Also strong for information-dense display. Not for durable apps or simple in-chat questions.
